title: Day 9 Lesson 1 ( Video )Giving an impression about the school
html:
Day 9 - Lesson 1

がっこう の いんしょう を はなす　(gakkoo no inshoo o hanas)  = Giving an impression about the school

ばしょ (Location): がっこう の ロビー　(gakkoo no robii) = School's lobby

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters):  がくせい ふたり  (gaksee hutari) = Two students

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
